tours.title: Classic Biokovo Adventure
tours.description: Experience the breathtaking views of Mount Biokovo with our guided hiking tour. Perfect for beginners and families.

tours.title: Summit Explorer
tours.description: Challenge yourself with this full-day expedition to the Biokovo summit. Stunning panoramic views of Dalmatian coast.

tours.title: Photography Expedition
tours.description: Capture the magic of Biokovo with expert photography guidance. Ideal for photography enthusiasts of all levels.

tours.title: Sunset Trekking
tours.description: Enjoy a magical sunset from Mount Biokovo. A romantic and unforgettable experience for couples.
